description: arXiv:2511.08436v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: How complex collective behavior emerges from individual interactions is a fundamental scientific question, but experimental cost and difficulty of simultaneous multi-brain recordings limit direct study in animals. Here we introduce a novel computational framework modeling weakly electric fish-like agents with biophysically inspired elect...
